releaseNotes:
- PM feedback round for 1.7
- Move Clean Image from File menu to toolbar, also clear ruler
- Persist to DB, undo/redo support, include in export and report
- Shrink hit-area and replace toolbar icon
- Move to toolbar, selectable + draggable center handle, delete to remove
- View zoom (mouse wheel) + drag-pan when nothing selected
- PM feedback round 3 — canvas size/position now matches image view
- PM feedback round 2 — clip, titles, toolbar parity, canvas aspect+position
- PM feedback round 1 — tab refactor + visuals + output dim
- Image stitching — drag/scale/layer canvas to compose multiple X-ray images into one
